title: Fenn's 3D Rails
description: My own take on 3D Minecart Rails, with a more vanilla feel.
body:
# Fenn's **3D** Rails!
![Preview of all 4 Rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a56cb716ffe87b3926b206ee589865cf080094.png)
I personally wasn't satisfied with the 3D rail packs ive found as I feel they don't fit into the base game very well. So this is my attempt at a more simple and vanilla feeling 3D rail pack! (No voxels or polygonal curves)
